title: stelis cochlearis
intro: Stelis cochlearis, also known as the shell orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis cochlearis include reducing fever and relieving symptoms of respiratory tract infections, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-inflammatory relief for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to harness its medicinal properties to promote overall well-being.
